title: Control a Servo Motor
description: Learn to move a servo with an Arduino.

dialogue.text: Orion again! Ready to add some movement to your projects? Let's control a servo motor with your Arduino.

options.text: Yes! How do I hook it up?

dialogue.text: Connect the servo's control wire to pin 9, and power it from the 5V and ground pins. You'll need the Servo library in the Arduino IDE.

options.text: Wired up. What code do I use?

dialogue.text: Use the Sweep example from the Servo library. Upload it and watch the arm swing back and forth.
Nice work! With servos you can build all sorts of small robots. Keep experimenting!
